subcodes.title: Answer to Mirza Sulayman
subcodes.first_line: In the Name of Him Who is the Most Exalted, the Most High, Whom God hath made to be obeyed and honored, endued with majesty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسمه العلی الاعلی. بسمه العلی الاعلی الذی جعله الله عنده مطاعا مکر ما دام مجدا جعلت
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
